activity_1_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වචන නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_d.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_e.text:
Read along.
පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න.
ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

content.sentence_text: Temporary shori'ng' was installed to stabilise the excavation before the concrete foundation was poured.
External claddi'ng' was fixed to the steel frame to improve thermal insulation and weather resistance.
Steel pili'ng' was driven deep into the ground to support the excavation before the foundation work began.
Fi'ng'er joints were manufactured under controlled conditions to enhance the durability of the timber beams.

example.text:
Listen to the model dialogues.
ආදර්ශ සංවාදවලට සවන් දෙන්න.
மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

activity_2_a.text:
Match the words with the pictures.
පින්තූර සමඟ වචන ගලපන්න.
சொற்களைப் படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_2_d.text:
Read along.
පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න.
ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

activity_2_e.text:
Read the answer and use the pause to ask the correct question. Then compare your response with the model question.
 පිළිතුර කියවා නිවැරදි ප්‍රශ්නය ඇසීමට විරාමය භාවිතා කරන්න. ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර ආදර්ශ පිළිතුර සමඟ සසඳන්න.
 பதிலைக் கவனமாக வாசித்து, இடைவெளியில் சரியான கேள்வியை கேளுங்கள். பின்னர் உங்கள் கேள்வியை மாதிரி கேள்வியுடன் ஒப்பிடவும்.

example_dialogues.text_a: Where should I leave the safety checklist?
example_dialogues.text_b: Leave it on the supervisor’s desk, next to the inspection file.

example_dialogues.text_a: Is there a calibrated measuring device anywhere in the workshop?
example_dialogues.text_b: No, there isn’t. In fact, there aren’t any calibrated measuring devices in the workshop at the moment.

example_dialogues.text_a: Do you complete maintenance reports on Monday mornings?
example_dialogues.text_b: No, I don’t. But I complete maintenance reports on Monday evenings. I have more time to focus on documentation in the evenings than in the mornings.

dialogues.text_a: Does she usually inspect the equipment on Friday afternoons?
dialogues.text_b: No, she rarely inspects the equipment on Friday afternoons. She usually inspects it on Tuesday mornings.

dialogues.text_a: Why are you testing the backup system manually?
dialogues.text_b: I am testing it manually because the automated system is offline. I always test it manually when the automated system is unavailable.

dialogues.text_a: Can he assist us with the final inspection tomorrow afternoon?
dialogues.text_b: I’m afraid he can’t. He has to attend a compliance meeting tomorrow afternoon, and no replacement has been assigned.

dialogues.text_a: What do you usually do during the weekend?
dialogues.text_b: I like to review new technical manuals. I normally analyse one manual every Saturday, but this weekend I am going to review three updated manuals.

dialogues.text_a: Sir, may I leave thirty minutes earlier today? I have severe back pain.
dialogues.text_c: I strained it while lifting a freezer.

dialogues.text_a: Can you operate the digital monitoring system independently?
dialogues.text_b: Yes, I can. I regularly operate the digital monitoring system in my current role. In fact, this is my primary responsibility on Wednesdays.

activity_a.text:
Choose the correct answer.
 නිවැරදි පිළිතුර තෝරන්න.
 சரியான பதிலைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

activity_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

content.sentence: The concrete mixer _____ fully operational today.
The site engineer _____ a crack in the foundation yesterday morning.
The spirit level is placed _____ the measuring tape and the hammer on the workbench.
He usually _____ the formwork, but he _____ it right now.
There _____ always a safety sign near the scaffolding entrance.
There _____ eight safety helmets stored in the site office.
The supervisor _____ checks the reinforcement bars before concrete pouring.
You _____ operate the concrete vibrator carefully.
We _____ install the roof trusses tomorrow.
_____ the workmen _____ all the scheduled work at the site yesterday?
The mason _____ a plumb line now to check vertical alignment.
_____ any excavation pits near the boundary wall?
_____ he _____ the site report every evening?
He _____ his protective boots before entering the construction area every day.

activity_b.text: The concrete mixer is fully operational today.
The site engineer found a crack in the foundation yesterday morning.
The spirit level is placed between the measuring tape and the hammer on the workbench.
He usually assembles the formwork, but he is adjusting it right now.
There is always a safety sign near the scaffolding entrance.
There are eight safety helmets stored in the site office.
The supervisor usually checks the reinforcement bars before concrete pouring.
You must operate the concrete vibrator carefully.
I have to secure the scaffolding properly.
We are going to install the roof trusses tomorrow.
Did the workmen complete all the scheduled work at the site yesterday?
The mason is using a plumb line now to check vertical alignment.
Are there any excavation pits near the boundary wall?
Does he write the site report every evening?
He wears his protective boots before entering the construction area every day.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_b.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

activity_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_d.text: Read along. පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න. ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

Questions.question: What does Meena’s research about the company suggest?
Questions.answer: She prepares in advance and shows genuine interest.
options: She is mainly interested in wages and working hours.
She prepares in advance and shows genuine interest.
She expects full guidance without personal effort.

Questions.question: Why does Meena find construction work satisfying?
Questions.answer: She enjoys varied tasks and visible progress.
options: She prefers repeating the same tasks daily.
She enjoys varied tasks and visible progress.

Questions.question: What can be inferred about Meena’s approach to safety?
Questions.answer: She treats safety as part of everyday site work.
options: She follows rules only when supervisors are present.
She depends on others to manage site risks.
She treats safety as part of everyday site work.

Questions.question: How does Meena respond to changes in construction methods?
Questions.answer: She accepts the need to keep learning on site.
options: She avoids new tools and techniques.
She accepts the need to keep learning on site.
She believes traditional methods are always enough.

Questions.question: What does Meena’s attitude toward feedback show?
Questions.answer: She uses feedback to improve and cooperate better.
options: She prefers working alone without guidance.
She uses feedback to improve and cooperate better.

activity_b.text: I enjoy seeing real progress on site every day.
Each task is different, whether it is setting out, formwork, or finishing work, so the job is challenging and interesting.
I like working with my hands and being part of a team that builds safe and durable structures.
I am confident with basic masonry work, surface levelling, plastering, and assisting with formwork preparation.
I have also helped with concrete mixing, measuring and marking layouts, and checking alignment using spirit levels and measuring tapes.
I always follow site safety procedures.
I wear personal protective equipment, keep clear of unsafe areas, and ensure tools and materials are stored properly.
I also help keep the site clean to reduce the risk of accidents.
I can read simple drawings and use basic measuring tools.
I understand the importance of accurate measurements and proper materials.
I know construction methods are developing, so I try to learn by observing experienced workers and reading site instructions.
I communicate well with supervisors and co-workers, and I am comfortable following instructions from others.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.
මේ වීඩියෝ එක දෙවරක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Learn new words using Google Translate.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන ඉගෙන ගන්න.
கூகுள் ட்ரான்ஸ்லேட் பயன்படுத்தி புதிய சொற்களைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ளுங்கள்.

Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

Watch the video.
වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.
